positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a curious woodland fox surrounded by abstract geometric flora and subtle constellations. The fox has a confident, symmetrical pose, rendered in sharp silhouette style with subtle, textured line work for depth. The background should feature deep sapphire blues transitioning into warm amber gradients, accented by glowing, ethereal orbs and interlocking geometric patterns. The overall composition must be highly contrasting and symmetrical, suitable for a repeating textile pattern, with clean edges and a sense of ancient magic and adventure. Style: Detailed linocut print meets modern mid-century abstract art, vector quality, hyper-clean lines, high contrast.
negative: blur, noise, grain, low quality, text, signature, watermark, logo, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, cartoonish, photorealistic, low contrast, gradients (for artifacts)
